quote.text: I’m a big believer in consistency. I think if you can be consistent in your performance, then the results will come.
quote.author: Courtney Bruce

micro_action.task: Drink a glass of water right after waking up.

quote.text: You want to be the best in the world, and that doesn't happen overnight.
quote.author: Courtney Bruce

micro_action.task: Eat a piece of fruit with your lunch today.

quote.text: I’m always learning, I’m always trying to get better.
quote.author: Karrie Webb

micro_action.task: Say 'Thank you' to your parents for driving you to practice.

quote.text: Longevity in sport is about managing your body and your mind.
quote.author: Karrie Webb

micro_action.task: Stretch for 5 minutes before bed.

quote.text: There is a difference between calculated self-indulgence and good-natured enthusiasm.
quote.author: Traditional Sportsmanship Proverb

micro_action.task: Congratulate your opponent, even if you lost.

quote.text: Softball taught me that you can't always control the outcome, but you can control your effort.
quote.author: Stacey Porter

micro_action.task: Do one extra drill that you usually skip.

quote.text: You have to be willing to put in the hard yards when no one is watching.
quote.author: Stacey Porter

micro_action.task: Help set up or pack away equipment today.

quote.text: I just try to stay in the moment and enjoy the game I love.
quote.author: Mary Fowler

micro_action.task: Drink 2 liters of water today.

quote.text: Pressure is part of the game, you just have to embrace it.
quote.author: Mary Fowler

micro_action.task: Pack a healthy snack (like an orange or apple) for training.

quote.text: Success is a journey, not a destination.
quote.author: Ben Sweetland

micro_action.task: Reflect on how far you've come in 100 days.

quote.text: The only way to prove that you’re a good sport is to lose.
quote.author: Ernie Banks

micro_action.task: Shake hands firmly with everyone after your next game.

quote.text: Believe you can and you're halfway there.
quote.author: Theodore Roosevelt

micro_action.task: Give a genuine compliment to a teammate today.

quote.text: Don't let what you cannot do interfere with what you can do.
quote.author: John Wooden

micro_action.task: Practice one skill you are already good at to make it better.

quote.text: It’s not whether you get knocked down; it’s whether you get up.
quote.author: Vince Lombardi

micro_action.task: If you make a mistake today, take a breath and try again immediately.

quote.text: You miss 100% of the shots you don't take.
quote.author: Wayne Gretzky

micro_action.task: Drink a glass of water before every meal today.

quote.text: Ability is what you're capable of doing. Motivation determines what you do. Attitude determines how well you do it.
quote.author: Lou Holtz

micro_action.task: Have a piece of fruit for your afternoon snack.

quote.text: Hard work beats talent when talent doesn't work hard.
quote.author: Tim Notke

micro_action.task: Hold the door for someone today.

quote.text: An athlete cannot run with money in his pockets. He must run with hope in his heart and dreams in his head.
quote.author: Emil Zátopek

micro_action.task: Cheer loudly for your teammates today.

quote.text: Sports serve society by providing vivid examples of excellence.
quote.author: George F. Will

micro_action.task: Make your bed this morning without being asked.

quote.text: Most people give up just when they're about to achieve success.
quote.author: Ross Perot

micro_action.task: Complete your full warmup routine today, no shortcuts.

quote.text: To be a better player than you've ever been, you have to do something you’ve never done.
quote.author: Felicia Hall Allen

micro_action.task: Practice a skill with your non-dominant hand or foot.

quote.text: Every strike brings me closer to the next home run.
quote.author: Babe Ruth

micro_action.task: Eat two different types of fruit today.

quote.text: If you can't outplay them, outwork them.
quote.author: Ben Hogan

micro_action.task: Drink a glass of water after every training session.

quote.text: You can't put a limit on anything. The more you dream, the farther you get.
quote.author: Michael Phelps

micro_action.task: Share your dream for the season with your coach or parent.

quote.text: Set your goals high, and don't stop till you get there.
quote.author: Bo Jackson

micro_action.task: Write down three things you are grateful for today.

quote.text: Winning means you're willing to go longer, work harder, and give more than anyone else.
quote.author: Vince Lombardi

micro_action.task: Listen carefully to your coach's feedback today.

quote.text: The harder the battle, the sweeter the victory.
quote.author: Les Brown

micro_action.task: Keep going even when you feel tired during a drill.

quote.text: The difference between the impossible and the possible lies in a person's determination.
quote.author: Tommy Lasorda

micro_action.task: Drink a glass of water before starting your homework.

quote.text: There are no shortcuts to any place worth going.
quote.author: Beverly Sills

micro_action.task: Have an apple or a pear today.

quote.text: If you don't have confidence, you'll always find a way not to win.
quote.author: Carl Lewis

micro_action.task: Smile at yourself in the mirror and say, 'I've got this!'
